sketches.mechanism: Ownership move semantics: passing a non-Copy value transfers ownership, and any later use of the old binding is a compile-time error.
sketches.resonance: What is truly given cannot also remain in the giver's hands.

sketches.mechanism: IEEE-754 NaN is non-reflexive, so strict equality says NaN is not equal to itself.
sketches.resonance: There are states of being that cannot recognize even their own reflection.

sketches.mechanism: An interface value is nil only when both its dynamic type and dynamic value are nil; a typed nil pointer inside an interface is not nil.
sketches.resonance: An absence that still has a name is no longer nothing.
